creator: ychsiao@ychsiao.org
text:
With system base openssl version, build with GOST was fail

 [~] [23:52/W5] cat /var/db/ports/dns_bind99/options
 # This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
 # Options for bind99-9.9.5_15
 _OPTIONS_READ=bind99-9.9.5_15
 _FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=DOCS FILTER_AAAA FIXED_RRSET GOST GSSAPI IDN IPV6 LARGE_FILE LINKS NEWSTATS REPLACE_BASE RPZ_NSDNAME RPZ_NSIP RPZ_PATCH RRL SIGCHASE SSL THREADS DLZ_POSTGRESQL DLZ_MYSQL DLZ_BDB  DLZ_LDAP DLZ_FILESYSTEM DLZ_STUB
 OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=DOCS
 OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=FILTER_AAAA
 OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=FIXED_RRSET
 OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=GOST
 OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=GSSAPI
 OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=IDN
 OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=IPV6
 OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=LARGE_FILE
 OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=LINKS
 OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=NEWSTATS
 OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=REPLACE_BASE
 OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=RPZ_NSDNAME
 OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=RPZ_NSIP
 OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=RPZ_PATCH
 OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=RRL
 OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SIGCHASE
 OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=SSL
 OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=THREADS
 OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=DLZ_POSTGRESQL
 OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=DLZ_MYSQL
 OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=DLZ_BDB
 OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=DLZ_LDAP
 OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=DLZ_FILESYSTEM
 OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=DLZ_STUB
